title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 2
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear boy and girl talking about the music lesson.
items.audio_script: Boy: Hi, Emma. I’m checking the plan for the music lesson. I thought we were going to go to the main hall, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Girl: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The lesson is in the small room next to the office[/1]. || Boy: Good thing I asked. I nearly taken my guitar to the wrong building. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Girl: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Hi, Emma. I’m checking the plan for the music lesson. I thought we were going to go to the main hall, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. The lesson is in the small room next to the office.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly taken my guitar to the wrong building. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.question: Where is the music lesson today?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, large school hall with chairs, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, small music room beside an office door, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, school playground with children, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “The lesson is in the small room next to the office.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear customer and assistant talking about the cake recipe.
items.audio_script: Customer: Hi, Sam. I’m checking the plan for the cake recipe. I thought we were going to buy butter, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Assistant: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]We need more eggs, not butter, before we can start[/1]. || Customer: Good thing I asked. I nearly opened the butter already. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Assistant: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.context: You hear student and teacher talking about the bus home.

I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Teacher: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.
